CustomField.description: Single source of truth for UI status rendering on Bulk Buy posts. Combines lifecycle status with reservation availability.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Cancelled'), 'Cancelled', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Expired'), 'Expired', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed (Offer Accepted / Need Met)'), 'Completed', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Pickup_Ready'), 'Pickup Ready', IF(Total_Available__c <= 0, 'Fully Reserved', IF(Total_Reserved__c > 0, 'Shares Available', 'Available'))))))
CustomField.label: Display Status
